race.comment: CAFFETTIERA (2) is racing well and a win looks close, just finding one better at Ballarat in this grade when last seen, finding the line well to be beaten under a length. Up to 1200m suits nicely now and she should get every chance from the inside gate. ANYWAYS (4) broke through for a soft maiden win at Taree when last seen 49 days ago. This is harder but she can improve again and will give a sight. DRONE ATTACK (1) struggled up in grade at Mornington last start but had been racing well prior and is fresh for this. She'll be back but can be running on strongly. FRESHEN (5) hasn't fired in two runs this time in but is lightly raced and did win her debut at this track, she could improve.
